posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ShaneCornerus dApps (decentralized applications) are applications that run on a blockchain or decentralized network rather than a centralized server.

They use smart contracts to execute transactions automatically and operate without a single point of control. dApps are often open-source, transparent, and resistant to censorship. Examples include decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms, gaming apps, and social networks built on blockchain technology.

My understanding is As of today, Monday.com does not directly support “dApps” (decentralized applications) on its platform, meaning there is no official list of dApps available to integrate with Monday.com
